fields.name: edition
fields.whyRequired: The licensed edition determines which features and limits the deployment is entitled to.
fields.validationCommand: Compare the configured edition flag against the signed commercial agreement.
fields.expectedSuccessfulOutput: Configured edition matches the entitlement on the executed agreement.

fields.name: entitlement
fields.whyRequired: Entitlements bound usage (seats, projects, quotas) and the license expiry.
fields.validationCommand: Validate the runtime license token's entitlement claims against the agreement and check expiry > today.
fields.expectedSuccessfulOutput: Entitlement claims match the agreement; license not expired.

fields.name: enforcementMode
fields.exampleValue: warn-only (EMULATED default) | options: off | warn-only | enforce
fields.whyRequired: Determines whether exceeding entitlements logs a warning or blocks; must match contractual intent.
fields.validationCommand: Inspect the licensing configuration and trigger an over-limit condition in a test environment to observe behaviour.
fields.expectedSuccessfulOutput: Over-limit condition produces the contractually-agreed behaviour (warn or block) and an audit record.
